calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Insurance Appraisal Award
Off Calendar Mar-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER ABDOL NOVIN, AS TRUSTEE OF THE NOVIN FAMILY TRUST'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Insurance Appraisal Award. Granted per the parties' stipulation.
The court signed the proposed judgment submitted with the moving papers and converted one copy of the proposed judgment into an order and signed it. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
